overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character transitions from an open plaza with massive digital billboards, ascends to an upper walkway past a transit station, and descends into a covered market street lined with food stalls and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital billboards and overpass

events.description: companion in yellow pants diverges left while ego continues straight forward
crossing the wide plaza area with other pedestrians moving in scattered directions

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked plaza following a companion, then continuing straight as the companion turns left

notable_agents.action: companion character in yellow pants walking ahead then turning left and exiting frame
pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the plaza in the rain

entered.detail: large curved concrete overpass structure with red and green neon strip lighting underneath
tall building covered in large digital advertising screens displaying animated content
rain-soaked paved ground with reflective puddles showing neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with vibrant neon strip lights, following a companion through a rain-soaked urban plaza. As the companion diverges left, the character continues across the open plaza toward massive digital billboards, with wet pavement reflecting the colorful city lights and sparse vehicle traffic visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with blue planter and stair entrance to upper level

events.description: approaching the blue planter structure and the base of the stairs
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs to the upper walkway level

agents.ego_description: walking past the distinctive blue planter with tree and beginning to climb the stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: large rectangular blue planter containing a mature tree with green foliage
building with distinctive curved traditional East Asian roof architecture visible in the distance
wide concrete staircase leading up to the elevated pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open plaza past a distinctive blue planter with a tree, approaching a wide concrete staircase. The traditional Japanese-style roof of a distant building becomes visible as the character begins ascending the stairs to the upper pedestrian level, leaving the overpass structure behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with transit station access

events.description: passing the NCART station entrance with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level walkway past the NCART station entrance and various illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored clothing walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: transit station entrance with NCART signage and glass doors
tall vertical digital billboard displaying the number 16 and advertising content
modern skyscraper with illuminated glass facade rising in the background
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street level

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated pedestrian walkway, the character passes modern glass towers and a large vertical billboard displaying '16'. The NCART station entrance appears on the right side of the path, with digital advertising screens illuminating the rainy night. The environment is semi-covered with building overhangs providing partial shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway descending into covered market area with neon lighting

events.description: descending the concrete stairs with blue neon strip lighting along the walls
entering the covered lower market area from the stairway

agents.ego_description: descending the neon-lit stairs into the lower covered market area, transitioning from open walkway to enclosed space

entered.detail: concrete staircase illuminated by bright blue neon light strips running horizontally along the wall
entrance to the covered market area with overhead concrete structure
food vendor cart with umbrella and illuminated menu visible at the bottom of the stairs
illuminated vending machine with glowing display panels

segments.scene_description: The character descends a staircase bathed in blue neon light, transitioning from the elevated walkway into a covered lower level. The environment becomes more enclosed with purple and blue ambient lighting. At the bottom of the stairs, a food stall cart and vending machine mark the entrance to the covered market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: entering the dense market area with multiple food stalls and vendors

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered market street passing food stalls and shoppers, surrounded by pink and cyan neon lights

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at stall waiting for customers
shopper in red clothing walking through the market crowd

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof structure covering the market walkway
bright pink neon signs and strip lights illuminating the market stalls
multiple food vendor stalls with illuminated displays and umbrellas
tangle of power lines and cables running between buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow covered market street bathed in pink and cyan neon light. The character walks past food vendor stalls and shoppers browsing goods, with overhead utility wires crisscrossing between the buildings. The environment is fully sheltered from the rain, creating an intimate, bustling atmosphere distinct from the open plaza above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban plaza that gradually transitions into a sheltered, neon-lit market street. It begins under a concrete overpass with vibrant strip lights, following a character across wet pavement reflecting massive digital billboards as they move away from a companion. As the character passes a blue planter, the scene shifts toward a wide concrete staircase, ascending from the open plaza to an elevated pedestrian walkway lined with glass towers and the illuminated entrance of an NCART station. The camera then follows the character down a blue-neon-bathed staircase, leaving the open air behind to enter a more enclosed lower level marked by vending machines and food carts. Finally, the environment opens into a narrow covered market street where pink and cyan lights illuminate bustling food stalls and crisscrossing utility wires, fully sheltering the scene from the rain.
